title: After the Tenno Sho (Autumn): Overlapping Dreams

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To an Umamusume, the Twinkle Series is
synonymous with dreams.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hair-raising clashes, passion that permeates one's
whole body, frenzied stampedes down the
stretch.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Countless hopefuls reach for the throne, for
honor, glory, and the realization of dreams
they've harbored since childhood.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And their dreams become the dreams of all who
watch from the stands.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Some are enchanted by the Cinderella story of a
runner emerging from humble rural origins out
into the national spotlight.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Some see their hopes and ideals embodied in the
prideful scions of a prestigious family.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And some...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Ineeeees!
Big Siiis!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: ...Haha!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Some see her running in the rain, a wide grin
across her face even as sweat drips from her
brow, and can't help but share her smile, and her
dreams.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
More than anyone, you just want me to have a
good time racing. Can I count on you to always
push me to have fun?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Ahaha, knew it.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Still, I'm not going to run for you, y'know. I run for
myself!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I won't let anyone's cheers be a burden. I'll let
them be my strength instead, and then use that
strength to zoom across the finish line!
choice_data_list: If that's what works for you, it works for me!
If that's what works for you, it works for me!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I thought you'd say that!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hey, so what if we made our next race another
one with heaps of dreams riding on it?
choice_data_list: You mean like the Japan Cup?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, that's exactly what I was thinking! Let's
take on the world! I know there are gonna be all
kinds of racers taking part...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: But I also know that I'm gonna enjoy the race more than anyone else!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with that, Ines Fujin and I begin our
preparations for the Japan Cup.
